statements.sql: select * from `super_admins` where `id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `roles` where `roles`.`id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `products` where `products`.`id` = 301859 limit 1
select * from `product_attribute_values` where `product_attribute_values`.`product_id` in (301859)
select * from `product_images` where `product_images`.`product_id` in (301859) order by `position` asc
select * from `product_videos` where `product_videos`.`product_id` in (301859) order by `position` asc
select * from `channels` where `hostname` in ('127.0.0.1:8000', 'http://127.0.0.1:8000', 'https://127.0.0.1:8000')
select * from `channels` limit 1

select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1
select * from `channels` where `code` = 'default'
select * from `locales` where `locales`.`id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `product_flat` where `product_flat`.`product_id` = 301859 and `product_flat`.`product_id` is not null and `channel` = 'default' and `locale` = 'en' limit 1
select * from `attribute_families` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1 limit 1

select `attributes`.* from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` inner join `attribute_groups` on `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = `attribute_groups`.`id` inner join `attribute_families` on `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = `attribute_families`.`id` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1
select * from `channels`
select * from `locales` where `code` = 'en'
select * from `product_inventories` where `product_inventories`.`product_id` in (301859)
select * from `inventory_sources` where `status` = 1

select `categories`.`id`, `category_translations`.`name` from `categories` inner join `category_translations` on `categories`.`id` = `category_translations`.`category_id` and `category_translations`.`locale` = 'en' order by `category_translations`.`name` asc

select `categories`.*, `product_categories`.`product_id` as `pivot_product_id`, `product_categories`.`category_id` as `pivot_category_id` from `categories` inner join `product_categories` on `categories`.`id` = `product_categories`.`category_id` where `product_categories`.`product_id` = 301859
select * from `category_translations` where `category_translations`.`category_id` in (127)
select * from `locales`
select * from `channel_translations` where `channel_translations`.`channel_id` = 1 and `channel_translations`.`channel_id` is not null
select * from `locales` where `locales`.`id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `channel_translations` where `channel_translations`.`channel_id` = 1 and `channel_translations`.`channel_id` is not null
select * from `attribute_groups` where `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = 1 and `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` is not null order by `position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` as `pivot_product_id`, `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id` from `attributes` inner join `product_super_attributes` on `attributes`.`id` = `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` where `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` = 301859

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 1 and `code` not in ('price', 'cost', 'special_price', 'special_price_from', 'special_price_to', 'length', 'width', 'height', 'weight', 'manage_stock') order by `pivot_position` asc
select * from `attribute_options` where `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` = 23 and `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` is not null order by `sort_order` asc
select * from `attribute_options` where `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` = 24 and `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` is not null order by `sort_order` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 2 and `code` not in ('price', 'cost', 'special_price', 'special_price_from', 'special_price_to', 'length', 'width', 'height', 'weight', 'manage_stock') order by `pivot_position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 3 and `code` not in ('price', 'cost', 'special_price', 'special_price_from', 'special_price_to', 'length', 'width', 'height', 'weight', 'manage_stock') order by `pivot_position` asc
select * from `inventory_sources` where `status` = 1
select * from `currencies` where `code` = 'USD'
select * from `products` where `products`.`parent_id` = 301859 and `products`.`parent_id` is not null

select `attributes`.*, `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` as `pivot_product_id`, `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id` from `attributes` inner join `product_super_attributes` on `attributes`.`id` = `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` where `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` = 301859

select `products`.*, `product_up_sells`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_up_sells`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_up_sells` on `products`.`id` = `product_up_sells`.`child_id` where `product_up_sells`.`parent_id` = 301859

select `products`.*, `product_cross_sells`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_cross_sells`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_cross_sells` on `products`.`id` = `product_cross_sells`.`child_id` where `product_cross_sells`.`parent_id` = 301859

select `products`.*, `product_relations`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_relations`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_relations` on `products`.`id` = `product_relations`.`child_id` where `product_relations`.`parent_id` = 301859

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 4 and `code` not in ('price', 'cost', 'special_price', 'special_price_from', 'special_price_to', 'length', 'width', 'height', 'weight', 'manage_stock') order by `pivot_position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 5 and `code` not in ('price', 'cost', 'special_price', 'special_price_from', 'special_price_to', 'length', 'width', 'height', 'weight', 'manage_stock') order by `pivot_position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 6 and `code` not in ('price', 'cost', 'special_price', 'special_price_from', 'special_price_to', 'length', 'width', 'height', 'weight', 'manage_stock') order by `pivot_position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 7 and `code` not in ('price', 'cost', 'special_price', 'special_price_from', 'special_price_to', 'length', 'width', 'height', 'weight', 'manage_stock') order by `pivot_position` asc
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.design.admin_logo.favicon'
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.content.custom_scripts.custom_css' and `channel_code` = 'default'
select * from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.design.admin_logo.logo_image'
select `value` from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.superadmin.referral_code' limit 1
select `value` from `core_config` where `code` = 'general.superadmin.referral_code' limit 1
